title: Phone OTP signup/login (Kavenegar)
description: Phone-first auth via SMS OTP using Kavenegar API. Console fallback in dev. 3 OTP/10min rate limit. Redis-backed OTP storage with 5-min expiry.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign up and log in via phone OTP on production. Kavenegar sends real SMS. Rate limiting prevents abuse.
risks: Kavenegar API key not configured for production. Without it, no phone signups work.

title: Email + password auth
description: Credentials provider with bcrypt hashing. Email + password login/signup flows via Auth.js v5.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign up and log in with email + password. Password hashed with bcrypt.

title: Email verification flow
description: Nodemailer sends verification email with 24h token. Needs SMTP credentials for production.
acceptanceCriteria: User receives verification email after signup. Clicking link verifies account. Works on production SMTP.
risks: SMTP credentials not configured. Console fallback only in dev. Production email doesn't send.

title: Password reset flow
description: Forgot password generates 1h expiring token. Reset endpoint validates and updates password. Requires SMTP.
acceptanceCriteria: User can request password reset, receive email, and set new password.

title: User profiles & avatars
description: Profile update: name, bio, avatar (Sharp → WebP), tradingStyle, sessionPreference, preferredPairs.
acceptanceCriteria: User can edit profile, upload avatar, view other profiles.

title: Username system + availability check
description: Real-time debounced (500ms) availability check. Unique constraint at DB. Reserved username list.
acceptanceCriteria: Username selection works with real-time validation. Reserved names blocked.

title: JWT sessions (Auth.js v5)
description: JWT strategy with extended token: id, role, isPro, username, phone, onboardingComplete.
acceptanceCriteria: Sessions persist across requests. Token contains all required fields.

title: i18n + RTL support (en/fa)
description: 31 translation sections in both en.json and fa.json. Logical CSS properties only (ms/me/ps/pe). Client useTranslation() + server t().
acceptanceCriteria: All user-visible strings use t(). Persian translation is proper Farsi. RTL layout works.

title: EA/MetaTrader auth (register + login)
description: Username+password auth for MetaTrader EA. API key generation. One-time use login tokens via Redis.
acceptanceCriteria: EA can register, log in, and authenticate via API key for subsequent requests.

title: Referral tracking on signup
description: Fire-and-forget event tracking: LINK_COPIED, LINK_SHARED, SIGNUP, SUBSCRIPTION. Admin analytics dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Referral links track signups. Admin sees analytics with top referrers.

title: Statement upload + HTML parsing
description: Upload MT4/MT5 HTML statement files. Cheerio parser extracts: totalNetProfit, grossProfit/Loss, profitFactor, winRate, maxDrawdown. Stored as JSONB.
acceptanceCriteria: User uploads HTML statement → parser extracts metrics → stored in DB → displayed on profile.

title: Admin statement review/approval
description: Admin dashboard to review uploaded statements: view original HTML, approve/reject with notes. Status: PENDING/VERIFIED/REJECTED/EXPIRED.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can review, approve, or reject statements with notes.

title: MT account linking
description: User links multiple MT accounts via settings. MtAccount model: accountNumber, broker, platform, balance, equity, leverage. API key per account.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add/remove MT accounts. API key generated for each. EA connects via key.

title: Auto-recalculate trader statements
description: statement-calc.service.ts recalculates TraderStatements on trade close. Monthly, seasonal, all-time aggregation. Admin can force recalculation.
acceptanceCriteria: Trader statements auto-update when trades close. Admin can trigger manual recalc.

title: Clan CRUD + settings
description: Clan creation, editing, deletion. Settings: name (unique), description, avatar, tradingFocus, isPublic, tier (FREE/PRO). Creator becomes LEADER.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create/edit/delete clans. Roles work (LEADER, CO_LEADER, MEMBER).

title: Real-time chat (Socket.io)
description: Socket.io on /api/socketio. JWT auth. Rooms: clan:{id}, topic:{clanId}:{topicId}. Messages with replies, edits, deletes. 5msg/60s rate limit.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send/receive messages in real-time. Replies, edits, deletes work. Rate limiting prevents spam.

title: Chat topics & threading
description: ChatTopic model with isDefault flag. Sort order. ACTIVE/ARCHIVED status. Create/edit/delete endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Clan leaders can create topics. Messages are scoped to topics. Archive works.

title: Signal & analysis trade cards
description: SIGNAL and ANALYSIS card types. Cards created via Socket.io with full validation. Rendered inline in chat. Version history for edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create SIGNAL/ANALYSIS cards. Cards render with entry/SL/TP. Edits tracked.

title: Trade tracking & lifecycle
description: Trade lifecycle: PENDING → OPEN → TP_HIT/SL_HIT/BE/CLOSED. Full status history with TradeEvent audit. Actions: SET_BE, MOVE_SL, CHANGE_TP, CLOSE.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade status progresses correctly. All state changes logged. Actions (BE/SL/TP/close) work.

title: Direct messages
description: 1:1 DMs with typing indicators, read receipts, image attachments (up to 4). Socket.io rooms: dm:{sortedUserIds}.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send/receive DMs. Read receipts and typing indicators work.

title: Join requests + invite codes
description: Join requests (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED) for private clans. Invite codes with expiry, maxUses, uses tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Private clan join flow works. Invite codes with limits work.

title: Reactions, pinning, images, typing, presence
description: Emoji reactions on messages. Pin/unpin messages. Image uploads (up to 4, Sharp → WebP). Typing indicators via Socket.io. Redis presence (5min TTL).
acceptanceCriteria: All social features work: reactions, pinning, images, typing indicators, online presence.

title: Season management
description: Season model with UPCOMING/ACTIVE/COMPLETED/ARCHIVED lifecycle. Admin can create/edit/close seasons.
acceptanceCriteria: Seasons can be created, activated, and completed. Rankings scoped to seasons.

title: Multi-lens rankings (6 lenses)
description: Composite, profitFactor, winRate, consistency, riskAdjusted, lowRisk. Configurable weights. Min trade threshold.
acceptanceCriteria: Leaderboard shows rankings across 6 lenses. Admin can recalculate. Weights configurable.

title: Badge system (rank/perf/trophy)
description: 3 categories: rank (min_closed_trades), performance (metric rolling windows), trophy (season placement). Auto-evaluation, admin dry-run, recompute.
acceptanceCriteria: Badges auto-awarded on milestones. Admin can dry-run and recompute. Badge CRUD works.

title: Season results page
description: Final standings, awards, highlights after season ends. Not yet implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: After season ends, results page shows final standings, top performers, awards.

title: Channel feed & posts
description: ChannelPost model: title, content, images, isPremium. Telegram-style broadcast. View counts. Reactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Clan channel shows posts. Users can create posts with images. View counts track.

title: Auto-post from trade cards
description: High-signal trades auto-posted to channel. Feature-flag gated (auto_post). Tag matching against clan settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade cards with matching tags auto-post to channel when feature flag enabled.

title: Discover page + filters
description: Clans tab + Free Agents tab. Search, focus filter, tier filter. Public clans discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can discover public clans and free agents. Filters work.

title: Follow system
description: Follow model: followerId, followingType (USER/CLAN), followingId. Follow/unfollow with counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can follow/unfollow clans and users. Follower counts display correctly.

title: Economic calendar sync + event reminders
description: MT5 EA sends calendar events. Upsert with externalId+source uniqueness. Rate limiting (5-min window). Socket.io event reminders at 1h and 1min before.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar events display. Reminders fire via Socket.io before high-impact events.

title: Stories system
description: DB model exists (Story: userId, imageUrl, expiresAt). No API routes or UI built. Ephemeral 24h content.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create stories (image + text). Stories expire after 24h. Viewable in feed.

title: Integrity contract (deny-by-default)
description: 6-condition eligibility check: MT-linked, integrityStatus, resolutionSource, card-before-trade timing, initial SL snapshot, no duplicate MT ticket. 12+ loopholes identified and fixed.
acceptanceCriteria: No trade is counted for rankings unless all 6 conditions pass. Reason codes displayed in UI. Unit tests pass.
risks: Complex logic — any regression could allow fraudulent trades to count.

title: Admin override governance
description: Admin can manually override trade eligibility. All overrides logged in TradeEvent with MANUAL_OVERRIDE reason. API returns 422 for ineligible trades.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can override. All overrides auditable. Non-admin cannot override.

title: EA/MetaTrader bridge (two-way)
description: EA→Server: heartbeat, trade-event, calendar. Server→EA: pending actions queue. Rate limiting on calendar sync. Action results tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: EA heartbeat works. Trade events sync. Pending actions delivered. Calendar events upserted.

title: Trade integrity evaluator (background)
description: Background job every 60s evaluating all pending trades. Feature-flag gated (trade_integrity_evaluator). Returns evaluated count, status changes, errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Background evaluator runs every 60s when flag enabled. Trades auto-evaluated.

title: Feature flags system
description: FeatureFlag model with Redis caching (60s TTL). Admin CRUD. 2 runtime-gated features: auto_post, trade_integrity_evaluator.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature flags toggle features at runtime. Redis cache prevents DB hit on every check.

title: Deploy pipeline (US build → Iran deploy)
description: 3 bash scripts: deploy-pack.sh (tarball on US), deploy-staging.sh (to staging), promote-to-prod.sh (with backup + auto-rollback + health check).
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy from US to Iran staging works. Promote to prod with auto-rollback works.

title: PM2 process management
description: ecosystem.config.cjs with auto-restart, 1GB memory limit, log rotation. Custom HTTP server wraps Next.js + Socket.io.
acceptanceCriteria: PM2 manages the process. Auto-restart on crash. Memory limit enforced.

title: Staging environment
description: Staging on port 3001, Redis DB 1. Separate .env. Health checks before promotion.
acceptanceCriteria: Staging environment isolated from prod. Can test before promoting.

title: Error monitoring (GlitchTip/Sentry)
description: Self-hosted Sentry alternative. No international API dependency. Not yet implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Production errors captured, alerting enabled, dashboard accessible.
risks: No error monitoring means production bugs go undetected.

title: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
description: Lint + type-check + build on push. No GitHub Actions workflows exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Every push triggers lint + type-check + build. PRs block on failure.
risks: Without CI, broken code can be deployed.

title: Structured logging (Pino)
description: Replace 150+ console.log calls with JSON structured logging via Pino. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: All server-side logging uses Pino. JSON log output. Log levels enforced.

title: Automated database backups
description: No automated pg_dump script or cron job. Only manual snapshots during deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily automated pg_dump cron job. Backups stored safely. Restore drill documented and tested.
risks: Data loss on server failure without automated backups.

title: Uptime monitoring + Telegram alerts
description: Cron health check script with Telegram bot notifications. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: External monitor checks /health every minute. Telegram alert on downtime.

title: Health check API endpoint
description: No /api/health endpoint exists. Deployment scripts use homepage HTTP check only.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/health returns DB + Redis + Socket.io connectivity status. Used by monitoring.
risks: Cannot properly monitor without a health endpoint.

title: Rate limiting coverage
description: Currently: OTP (3/10min), chat (5/60s), EA heartbeat. Missing: API routes, auth endpoints, image uploads, admin actions.
acceptanceCriteria: All public endpoints have rate limiting. Auth endpoints have aggressive limits.
risks: Missing rate limits on some endpoints could lead to abuse.

title: Security audit (OWASP top 10)
description: No formal security audit conducted. Input validation via Zod exists. Auth checks on admin routes exist.
acceptanceCriteria: OWASP top-10 review completed. All findings addressed. Report documented.
risks: Undetected vulnerabilities in a financial platform.

title: E2E test suite (Playwright)
description: 29 test specs: auth, clans, members, join requests, invites, chat, topics, trades, DMs, posts, discovery, leaderboard, permissions, rate-limiting, badges, EA, watchlist, journal, admin, settings, referrals.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 E2E specs pass. Admin test runner works.

title: PWA + service worker + offline
description: Full service worker with cache strategies. Offline page. LRU eviction. Install prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: App installable on mobile. Offline page shows when disconnected. Caches work.

title: Mobile responsive polish
description: Telegram-like layout on mobile. Bottom nav, hamburger menu, overflow fixes. Partially complete.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical flows work on mobile. No horizontal overflow. Touch targets meet 44px minimum.
risks: Iranian users are primarily mobile — broken mobile UX loses majority of users.

title: SEO (OG tags, sitemap, canonical)
description: Basic metadata exists. Missing: OG images, sitemap.ts, robots.ts, structured data.
acceptanceCriteria: Proper OG images, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, canonical URLs.

title: Onboarding flow (intent + missions)
description: Intent modal (4 options: LEARN/COMPETE/SHARE/RECRUIT) done. Missions dashboard exists. No guided tour.
acceptanceCriteria: New users see intent modal → missions checklist. Completing missions unlocks badges.

title: ZarinPal payment gateway
description: Primary Iranian payment gateway. Node.js SDK. Not implemented at all — no code, no SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can pay via ZarinPal. Payment verified server-side. Receipt stored.
risks: ZarinPal sandbox testing required. Toman pricing.

title: Subscription checkout flow
description: SubscriptionPlan model + admin CRUD exists. No checkout flow, no payment verification, no subscription enforcement.
acceptanceCriteria: User selects plan → pays via ZarinPal → subscription activated → isPro flag set.

title: Paywall enforcement
description: PaywallRule model + admin CRUD exists. applyPaywall() function exists but is NEVER called in production API routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Paywall rules are enforced at API boundaries. Non-pro users see redacted content.
risks: Infrastructure exists but zero enforcement. All content is currently free.

title: Channel subscription marketplace
description: Clans set price, 70-80% split. Browse, preview, subscribe. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Clans can set subscription price. Users can subscribe. Revenue split applied.

title: Landing page + marketing
description: Landing page with hero, features, stats, CTA sections. Self-hosted.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page renders correctly in both languages. CTA drives signups.

title: AIRouter service (failover chain)
description: OpenRouter → Ollama → Cache. 3s timeout, health checks, admin force-local toggle. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: AIRouter transparently routes queries. Failover works. Admin can force local mode.
risks: Requires AI server provisioning. Ollama models need GPU or large RAM.

title: Spectator AI chatbot
description: 3 free questions/day for non-pro users. System prompt with DB query access. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-pro users can ask 3 questions/day. AI responds with platform data context.

title: Clan AI assistant (@ai mention)
description: Pro-only AI assistant in clan chat. @ai trigger. Clan context injected. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: @ai mention in chat triggers AI response with clan context.

title: Blackout resilience test
description: Block international traffic on production. Verify all features work on NIN-only. Not tested.
acceptanceCriteria: Every feature works without international internet. AI falls back to local. Payments work on NIN.
risks: Unknown failure modes under blackout conditions.
